title: Uniface UX
text: Uniface UX A well-designed User Experience (UX) makes your customers want to use your application. Uniface UX provides an out-of-the-box solution that enables you to modernize and enhance your application's user interface with ease. Uniface UX currently provides field, entity, and component level widgets to directly influence your user experience. Over the coming Uniface releases, Uniface UX is enhanced to include new constructs. You add these constructs on top of your existing business model, allowing you to improve the user experience while you continue to focus on your business model, data, rules, and the business flow of your application. The first Uniface UX deliverable is a set of field widgets called Uniface UX Widgets . Table 1. Related learning videos Title link Uniface UX and UX Interface Related Links UX Widget Interface Web Widgets define the UX and UI of your web application. With UX Widget Interfaces you can implement your own UX Widgets, with layout constructs that match your preferred UI design. Creating a UX Widget To create a UX widget for a DSP field, an entity, or a component using the UX Widget Interface, you need to perform the following steps: UX Widget States and API Functions The following sections explain various UX widget states and it's API functions.
